# Description

# [PKT-LFC-010](task-0042): Preserve Provider Auto-Install Policy Fields

## Purpose

Preserve provider auto-install policy fields across lifecycle commands.

## Scope

- Policy field detection
- Preservation logic
- Validation

## Implementation

1. Detect policy fields
2. Implement preservation
3. Validate

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Policy fields detected
2. Preserved correctly
3. Validated
